title: body-based-routing chart values
description: Schema for the body-based-routing sub-chart. Only the values whose constraints are load-bearing for high availability (issue #89) are validated; all other keys are passed through unvalidated.

replicas.description: Number of BBR ext_proc replicas. BBR is a cluster-scope singleton on the request hot path, so a single replica is a single point of failure. At least 2 replicas are required for HA so the loss of one replica is a transparent failover rather than a cluster-wide 502 bbr_unavailable outage.

maxEjectionPercent.description: Hard cap on the share of the BBR ext_proc cluster that outlier detection may eject at once. MUST be < 100 so a single-replica blip cannot eject every replica and trip the fail-closed 502 bbr_unavailable path; that path must fire only when ALL replicas are unhealthy.
